and expertise related to children

Currently, the bill does not adequately identify

after an emergency event.

in January this year alone.

and recognition in the four key stages

emergencies, that expert representation

as a requirement of these groups.
A second recommendation is to take a child rights approach
to emergency management al New Zealand
